["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h2",null,{"id":"使用方法","children":"使用方法"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["首先按照",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://elrepo.org/tiki/tiki-index.php","rel":"nofollow","children":"官网的安装说明"}],"，配置 ELRepo："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"接着，按照你的系统版本，运行："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[{"title":"发行版","items":[["RHEL-10, SL-9",{"release":"el10","version":"10"}],["RHEL-9, SL-9",{"release":"el9","version":"9"}]]}],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["接下来是换源，建议先备份 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/yum.repos.d/elrepo.repo"}]," ："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["然后编辑 /etc/yum.repos.d/elrepo.repo 文件，在 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"mirrorlist="}]," 开头的行前面加 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"#"}]," 注释掉；并将 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"http://elrepo.org/linux"}]," 替换为"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-3"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"最后，更新软件包缓存"}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-4","codeLanguage":"bash"}]]}]

compiledTemplates.template-1: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("yum install https://www.elrepo.org/elrepo-release-");t.b(t.v(t.f("version",c,p,0)));t.b(".");t.b(t.v(t.f("release",c,p,0)));t.b(".elrepo.noarch.rpm");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
